title: micranthemum orbiculatum var. tweediei
intro: Micranthemum orbiculatum var. tweediei, also known as Tweedie's tiny waterwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Linderniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tweedie's tiny waterwort include treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
